description:
DLSS Swapper swap DLSS dlls in games.

DLSS Swapper is a tool that allows you to conveniently download, manage, and swap DLSS dlls allowing you to upgrade or downgrade DLSS version in a game without the game needing an update.
Sorry, this is not the FSR4 update
Work was still continuing on FSR4 as well as a new feature called DLL Sets to enable swapping multiple DLLs at once. Keep an eye out for v1.2.5 though! (sorry again)

Auto import for DLSS
From the library page you can now go Import -> NVIDA -> From driver to import DLSS DLLs that are already downloaded to your system and used by the driver. Or Import -> NVIDA -> Download from server to download from the NVIDIA servers directly.

Auto update
You can now update DLSS Swapper from within DLSS Swapper, no need to go to GitHub and download the update manually. This is only supported when DLSS Swapper is installed, you can't use this with the the portable version.

DLSS Frame Generation presets
DLSS FG presets A and B have been added.

Proxy support
For regions where downloads may be limited you can now enter proxy details to try and improve your experience.

Changelog
